
### fuzzing challenges  {.smaller}

* isolation: 
   * need to <em>detect crashes</em>/etc. reliably
   * want <em>reproducible test cases</em>
   * need to distinguish <em>hangs</em> from ‘‘machine is randomly slow’’
* speed: 
   * need to run <em>many millions of tests</em>
   * application startup times are a problem
* completeness:
   * might have to get <i>really</i> lucky to make interesting input
